codepipeline.pipeline.disableinboundstag: The name of the pipeline in which you want to disable the flow of artifacts from one stage to another.

codepipeline.pipeline.disableinboundstag.Description: The reason given to the user that a stage is disabled, such as waiting for manual approval or manual tests. This message is displayed in the pipeline console UI.
The name of the stage where you want to disable the inbound or outbound transition of artifacts.
